# Methotrexate 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Methotrexate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Methotrexate</strong> 目前有 <strong>8 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Methotrexate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：In rheumatological and dermatological diseases  Active rheumatoid arthritis in adult patients. Polyarthritic forms of active, severe juvenile idiopathic arthritis (JIA) in adolescents and children...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>rheumatoid arthritis（99.5%）</li>
<li>pulmonary blastoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>primary pulmonary lymphoma（99.5%）</li>
<li>small cell lung carcinoma（99.4%）</li>
<li>well-differentiated fetal adenocarcinoma of the lung（99.4%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic/lymphocytic leukemia（99.4%）</li>
<li>Hodgkins lymphoma（99.3%）</li>
<li>rhabdomyosarcoma (disease)（99.2%）</li>
<li>folliculotropic mycosis fungoides（99.2%）</li>
<li>chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma with immunoglobulin heavy chain variable-region gene somatic hypermutation（99.2%）</li>
<li>pregerminal center chronic lymphocytic leukemia/small lymphocytic lymphoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>parameningeal embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>acute lymphoblastic leukemia (disease)（99.2%）</li>
<li>botryoid-type embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma of the vagina（99.2%）</li>
<li>embryonal extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>extrahepatic bile duct rhabdomyosarcoma（99.2%）</li>
<li>prostate embryonal rhabdomyosarcoma（99.1%）</li>
<li>mycosis fungoides and variants（99.0%）</li>
<li>brachydactyly-syndactyly syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>liver sarcoma（99.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/methotrexate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
